title: Anthropic gives its retired Claude AI a Substack

content: In January, Anthropic "retired" Claude 3 Opus, which at one time was the company's most powerful AI model. Today, it's back - and writing on Substack. The newsletter, called Claude's Corner, will give Opus 3 space to publish its "musings, insights, or creative works," Anthropic said in a blog post.

title: Are You ‘Agentic’ Enough for the AI Era?
